redaction_policy: No raw prompts, transcripts, credentials, hostnames, or absolute local paths in public projections; adversarial redaction walks (FA-AC-52) are a required oracle, not a policy statement alone.
retention: Private native test output under var/; reviewed normalized receipts committed by digest when they exist.
notes: The overwhelming majority of Full Auto's real evidence lives here: real production modules (full-auto-registry.ts, full-auto-run-registry.ts, full-auto-reconcile.ts, thread-store.ts, local-turn-journal.ts) composed together in-process, plus real in-process Effect HTTP control servers exercised with real bearer auth. No live Electron process and no live provider round trip exist in this tier -- see ENV-FA-DEV-TWO-PROCESS-1 and ENV-FA-OWNER-REAL-SIDEBAR-1 for those.
